title: Objective
description: Strategic objective in the OKR system.

title.description: Short, directional, qualitative statement of intent.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the objective. Use 'draft' during planning phase.

owner.description: Person or role accountable for this objective.

timeframe.description: Quarter this objective belongs to. Format: 2026-Q2

key_results.description: List of Key Result IDs linked to this objective.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date of creation. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date of last update. Format: YYYY-MM-DD
